---
title: "11_xgboost-residual-maps"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(rsample)
library(vtreat)
library(xgboost)
library(spdep)
library(scales)
library(tibble)
```

```{r}
#| include: false
source("./style/data-visualisation_theme.R")
```

```{r}
wd <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS"
repo_root <- "/Users/carmen/Documents/github/de-bias/bias-detection"
output_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary/summary-figs/xgboost-residual-maps")
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

dataset_keys <- c("twitter", "fb_tts", "mapp1", "mapp2")

dataset_labels <- c(
  twitter = "Twitter/X",
  fb_tts = "Meta",
  mapp1 = "Multi-app1",
  mapp2 = "Multi-app2"
)

output_tag <- "_lad_holdout_nolagcov"
train_sample_prop <- 0.7
```

# Data helpers

```{r}
load_bias_data <- function(dfd, wd) {
  if (dfd == "twitter") {
    read.csv(file.path(wd, "data/outputs/twitter/monthly/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")) %>%
      rename(geography.code = code) %>%
      dplyr::filter(name != "City of London")
  } else if (dfd == "fb_tts") {
    read.csv(file.path(wd, "data/outputs/fb/census-month/populations/tts/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")) %>%
      rename(geography.code = code)
  } else if (dfd == "mapp1") {
    read.csv(file.path(wd, "data/outputs/mapp1/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")) %>%
      rename(geography.code = code) %>%
      dplyr::filter(name != "City of London")
  } else if (dfd == "mapp2") {
    read.csv(file.path(wd, "data/outputs/mapp2/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")) %>%
      rename(geography.code = code)
  } else {
    stop("Unsupported dataset: ", dfd)
  }
}

load_model_rds <- function(dfd, wd, output_tag) {
  if (dfd == "twitter") {
    readRDS(file.path(wd, paste0("data/outputs/twitter/monthly/populations/explain-bias/xgb-fit-final", output_tag, ".rds")))
  } else if (dfd == "fb_tts") {
    readRDS(file.path(wd, paste0("data/outputs/fb/census-month/populations/tts/explain-bias/xgb-fit-final", output_tag, ".rds")))
  } else if (dfd == "mapp1") {
    readRDS(file.path(wd, paste0("data/outputs/mapp1/census-month/populations/explain-bias/xgb-fit-final", output_tag, ".rds")))
  } else if (dfd == "mapp2") {
    readRDS(file.path(wd, paste0("data/outputs/mapp2/census-month/populations/explain-bias/xgb-fit-final", output_tag, ".rds")))
  } else {
    stop("Unsupported dataset: ", dfd)
  }
}

build_input_df <- function(dfd, wd) {
  df <- read.csv(file.path(wd, "data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/combined-data-ltla.csv"))
  
  df_var_lbl <- read_csv(file.path(wd, "data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/dictionary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    filter(!grepl("excluded", .$group, ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
    filter(!grepl("_lagq$", var_label5)) %>%
    filter(var_label5 != "bias_w")
  
  lda_sdf <- st_read(
    file.path(wd, "data/inputs/geographies/boundaries/LAD_Dec_2021_GB_BFC_2022_simplified.gpkg"),
    quiet = TRUE
  ) %>%
    filter(!grepl("^[SN]", code))
  
  df_bias <- load_bias_data(dfd, wd)
  
  df <- df %>%
    select(all_of(df_var_lbl$var_label5))
  
  centroids_df <- suppressWarnings(st_centroid(lda_sdf)) %>%
    st_coordinates() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rowid_to_column("row_id")
  
  centroids_with_ids <- lda_sdf %>%
    st_set_geometry(NULL) %>%
    rowid_to_column("row_id") %>%
    cbind(centroids_df) %>%
    select(-row_id) %>%
    rename(longitude = X, latitude = Y)
  
  df_extended <- full_join(df, centroids_with_ids, by = join_by(geography.code == code))
  
  df_standardised <- df_extended %>%
    select(-date) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(.)) / sd(.)))
  
  input_df <- merge(df_standardised, df_bias[, c("geography.code", "bias")], by = "geography.code") %>%
    select(-longitude, -latitude) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()
  
  list(input_df = input_df, lda_sdf = lda_sdf)
}

make_residual_map <- function(dfd, input_df, lda_sdf, xgb.fit.final) {
  xvars <- colnames(input_df[, 4:(ncol(input_df) - 1)])
  
  set.seed(123)
  split_df <- initial_split(input_df, prop = train_sample_prop)
  train_sample <- training(split_df)
  
  treatplan <- vtreat::designTreatmentsZ(
    train_sample,
    xvars,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  new_vars <- treatplan %>%
    magrittr::use_series(scoreFrame) %>%
    dplyr::filter(code %in% c("clean", "lev")) %>%
    magrittr::use_series(varName)
  
  aux_full_sample <- vtreat::prepare(
    treatplan,
    input_df,
    varRestriction = new_vars
  )
  
  missing_features <- setdiff(xgb.fit.final$feature_names, colnames(aux_full_sample))
  if (length(missing_features) > 0) {
    for (nm in missing_features) {
      aux_full_sample[[nm]] <- 0
    }
  }
  
  aux_full_sample <- aux_full_sample[, xgb.fit.final$feature_names, drop = FALSE]
  aux_full_sample <- as.matrix(aux_full_sample)
  
  input_df$bias_prediction <- predict(xgb.fit.final, aux_full_sample)
  input_df$model_residual <- input_df$bias - input_df$bias_prediction
  
  resid_area <- input_df %>%
    group_by(geography.code) %>%
    summarise(model_residual = mean(model_residual, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  df_boundaries_hex <- st_read(
    file.path(wd, "data/inputs/geographies/hexboundaries/uk-local-authority-districts-2021.geojson"),
    quiet = TRUE
  ) %>%
    st_transform(st_crs(lda_sdf)) %>%
    rename(code = id)
  
  st_model_resid_map <- df_boundaries_hex %>%
    filter(!grepl("^S", code)) %>%
    filter(!grepl("^N", code)) %>%
    filter(!grepl("^u", code)) %>%
    left_join(resid_area, by = c("code" = "geography.code")) %>%
    st_as_sf()
  
  resid_pos_max <- max(st_model_resid_map$model_residual[st_model_resid_map$model_residual > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  resid_neg_min <- min(st_model_resid_map$model_residual[st_model_resid_map$model_residual < 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  st_model_resid_map <- st_model_resid_map %>%
    mutate(
      model_resid_plot = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(model_residual) ~ NA_real_,
        model_residual >= 0 & is.finite(resid_pos_max) & resid_pos_max > 0 ~ pmin(model_residual / resid_pos_max, 1),
        model_residual < 0 & is.finite(resid_neg_min) & resid_neg_min < 0 ~ pmax(model_residual / abs(resid_neg_min), -1),
        TRUE ~ 0
      )
    )
  
  resid_aligned <- lda_sdf %>%
    st_set_geometry(NULL) %>%
    transmute(geography.code = code) %>%
    left_join(resid_area, by = "geography.code")
  
  nb_q <- spdep::poly2nb(lda_sdf, queen = TRUE)
  keep <- is.finite(resid_aligned$model_residual)
  nb_sub <- spdep::subset.nb(nb_q, subset = keep)
  lw_sub <- spdep::nb2listw(nb_sub, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
  x_sub <- resid_aligned$model_residual[keep]
  
  resid_moran <- spdep::moran.mc(
    x_sub,
    lw_sub,
    nsim = 999,
    zero.policy = TRUE
  )
  
  resid_mI <- as.numeric(resid_moran$statistic)
  resid_p_value_mI <- as.numeric(resid_moran$p.value)
  
  p_annotation_resid <- ifelse(
    resid_p_value_mI < 0.05,
    "p < 0.05",
    paste("p =", round(resid_p_value_mI, 2))
  )
  
  bbox <- st_bbox(st_model_resid_map)
  xmin <- bbox["xmin"]
  xmax <- bbox["xmax"]
  ymin <- bbox["ymin"]
  ymax <- bbox["ymax"]
  
  annotation_resid <- data.frame(
    x = c(xmin + 0.1 * (xmax - xmin), xmin + 0.1 * (xmax - xmin)),
    y = c(ymin + 0.85 * (ymax - ymin), ymin + 0.78 * (ymax - ymin)),
    label = c(paste0("I = ", round(resid_mI, 2)), p_annotation_resid)
  )
  
  residual_map <- ggplot(st_model_resid_map) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = model_resid_plot)) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("#2166AC", "white", "#B2182B"),
      values = scales::rescale(c(-1, 0, 1), from = c(-1, 1)),
      limits = c(-1, 1),
      na.value = "#2166AC",
      name = "Bias residual (%)\n[standardised -1 to 1]"
    ) +
    labs(title = " ") +
    geom_text(
      data = annotation_resid,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
      color = "black",
      size = 30,
      angle = 0,
      fontface = "bold",
      family = "robotocondensed"
    ) +
    theme_map_tufte() +
    theme(
      legend.text = element_text(size = 60),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 60, face = "bold", lineheight = 0.3, margin = margin(b = 12)),
      legend.position = "right",
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank()
    )
  
  out_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(dfd, "_lad_xgboost_holdout_nolagcov_residual_map_hex.png"))
  ggsave(
    filename = out_file,
    plot = residual_map,
    bg = "white",
    width = 10,
    height = 8,
    units = "in"
  )
  
  list(
    dataset = dfd,
    moran_i_residuals = resid_mI,
    p_value_residuals = resid_p_value_mI,
    file = out_file,
    plot = residual_map
  )
}
```

# Generate residual maps

```{r}
residual_map_results <- lapply(dataset_keys, function(dfd) {
  data_objs <- build_input_df(dfd, wd)
  xgb.fit.final <- load_model_rds(dfd, wd, output_tag)
  make_residual_map(dfd, data_objs$input_df, data_objs$lda_sdf, xgb.fit.final)
})

residual_map_summary <- bind_rows(lapply(residual_map_results, function(x) {
  tibble(
    dataset = x$dataset,
    moran_i_residuals = x$moran_i_residuals,
    p_value_residuals = x$p_value_residuals,
    file = x$file
  )
}))

residual_map_summary
```

# Preview

```{r}
residual_map_results[[1]]$plot
```
